name: burgess
description: The full creative cycle in one plugin: turn a conceptual document into a rigorously-grounded, queryable knowledge graph (human-editable canon, three-axis provenance, span-present write boundary, grounding loop with memory of failures), and diverge from any brief with a geometry-driven ideation engine (MAP-Elites, k-NN novelty, DPP slates, anti-collapse monitor) that proposes into the hypothesized lane — embeddings measure dispersion, never truth.

source_path.title: Source document path
source_path.description: Path to the source the graph is built and grounded against — a single Markdown/text file, or a directory or glob of .md/.txt files (each edge's span is verified against the specific file it came from). Markdown/text only — no PDF/media.

sensitivity.title: Egress sensitivity
sensitivity.description: Egress scrubbing aggressiveness — one of low | medium | high (low = secrets only; medium = + structured PII; high = + person/address heuristics). Validated by the engine; unknown values fall back to medium.

metrics_mode.title: Metrics mode
metrics_mode.description: One of structure_only | with_embeddings (structure_only uses graph structure as the signal; with_embeddings is currently inert — the former sqlite-vss candidate generator was removed). Validated by the engine; unknown values fall back to structure_only.

extract_wave_size.title: Extraction wave size
extract_wave_size.description: How many section-extractor subagents /kg-build launches concurrently per wave (bounded parallelism, 1–10). Higher = faster but more rate-limit/lock pressure. Default 6.
